summary: Iteration 50 - All 5 Bug Fixes VERIFIED. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 skipped - no locked contests). Frontend: UI verified - IST time format visible, matches displayed, contests loading correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix 1: manual_override flag correctly set in matches.py (line 461-464) and admin.py (line 1580-1583)
Bug Fix 2: contests.py join endpoint now accepts 'open' OR 'live' status (line 171)
Bug Fix 3: GET /api/matches/{match_id}/contests returns contests regardless of match status
Bug Fix 4: start_time_ist field added with proper IST formatting (e.g., '17 May 2026, 03:30 PM IST')
Bug Fix 5: Matches sorted by start_time descending (-1) in backend, frontend re-sorts for display
Autopilot service correctly filters manual_override != true in all queries (lines 186-240)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified all 5 bug fixes: (1) Manual override flag prevents autopilot from overriding admin status changes, (2) Join contest works for both 'open' and 'live' status, (3) Contests show for matches regardless of status, (4) IST time format displays correctly (e.g., '17 May 2026, 03:30 PM IST'), (5) Matches sorted by start_time descending. Key test data: KKR vs DC contest ID: 2db7cefe-e107-4a93-80a6-6a30104b2ccc (status: open, has manual_override=true). LSG vs DC contest ID: 53fe3a89-428c-4465-a613-ac8ca2661c0c (joined during testing). Admin has 98,500 coins after joining LSG vs DC contest.

bug_1_autopilot_override.verification: PUT /api/matches/{id}/status sets manual_override=true, autopilot queries filter manual_override != true

bug_2_join_button_disabled.verification: POST /api/contests/{id}/join works for both 'open' and 'live' status contests

bug_3_contests_not_showing.verification: GET /api/matches/{match_id}/contests returns contests regardless of match status

bug_4_wrong_ist_time.verification: start_time_ist field shows correct IST format (e.g., '17 May 2026, 03:30 PM IST')

bug_5_matches_not_sorted.verification: GET /api/matches returns matches sorted by start_time descending

ui_verification.login_flow: PASSED - Get Started → Phone → PIN → Admin Dashboard
ui_verification.player_view: PASSED - Shows home page with matches, IPL standings, live ticker
ui_verification.match_cards: PASSED - 10 match cards displayed on home page
ui_verification.ist_time_display: PASSED - '17 May 2026, 03:30 PM IST' visible on match detail
